nasb.text: You are the Lord God, Who chose Abram And brought him out from Ur of the Chaldees, And gave him the name Abraham.

esv.text: You are the Lord, the God who chose Abram and brought him out of Ur of the Chaldeans and gave him the name Abraham.

cnv.text: 你是耶和華　神， 你揀選亞伯蘭， 帶領他出了迦勒底的吾珥， 改他的名字為亞伯拉罕。

ccb.text: 你是耶和华上帝，你拣选了亚伯兰，带他离开迦勒底的吾珥，又给他改名为亚伯拉罕。
